message.content:
You are authoring an AsciiDoc procedural sub-spec for the Recipe Bottle project. The target file ALREADY EXISTS on disk at the path below — read it for the orphan-list content that needs wholesale replacement (its old content is the multi-role "sa_list" semantics; you are replacing it with director-specific "roster" semantics). The replacement must preserve the AXHO* block grammar and procedural detail discipline. Pure .adoc, no code.

TARGET FILE (overwrite with Write tool — file currently holds old "sa_list" content as starting reference):
/Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSDR-director_roster.adoc

NEW BEHAVIORAL CONTRACT (from RBS0:1071-1082, BBAAQ Surface 2):
- Operation: roster (list) director service accounts
- Anchor: [[rbtgo_director_roster]]
- Read-only observation
- Emits one fact file per discovered SA via the BUS0 multi-element fact-file convention (`buf_write_fact_multi` against a registered extension constant)
- Fact content is empty, presence-as-fact (the fact's basename IS the discovered identity)
- Stdout-substring assertions retire from the consumer-facing surface

DELTAS FROM ORPHAN (compare current file content):
- REPLACE auth: use {rbtoe_governor_authenticate} (instead of generic OAuth token from caller context). Roster is a governor-authenticated operation.
- KEEP the SA-list REST call (link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/list[iam.projects.serviceAccounts.list])
- UPDATE the endpoint URL to use {rbtgi_depot_project} not `{rbrr_depot_project_id}` (BBAAY retired that field). The depot project ID is now derived as RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID from (RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX, RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER).
- ADD a filter step: scope the listed accounts to those whose accountId starts with `${RBCC_role_director}-` prefix — director-side roster shows only director SAs (the multi-role generic listing retires; this is per-role observation per BBAAQ contract)
- DELETE the "Display Results" stdout enumeration block — stdout-substring assertions retire
- ADD a new step: for each discovered director SA, emit a fact file via `buf_write_fact_multi` against the registered extension constant `RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director` (which expands to `roster-director`). The fact's basename should be the SA's identity (recommend: the operator-typed name = the local-part stripped of the `${RBCC_role_director}-` prefix, OR the full local-part — match the convention from sibling depot fact-emission. Per ₣BB paddock note: "basename = identity (operator-typed name, extracted from API-returned local-part by stripping ${role}- prefix); content = full email"). For roster-singleton-per-role, basename derivation simplifies but follow the multi-fact convention from BUS0.
  - Reference: `buf_write_fact_multi <file_root> <ext> <value>` (see BUS0:642 signature)
  - Use the linked term {buf_write_fact_multi} for the call
- UPDATE //axhoc_completion to describe director roster semantics: "rosters {rbtr_director} service accounts via per-SA fact emission"

NEW STEP STRUCTURE (~5 steps):
1. Authenticate as Governor → store «GOVERNOR_TOKEN»
2. List service accounts via REST list call; store «ACCOUNTS» from .accounts[]
3. Filter to director SAs (accountId prefix `${RBCC_role_director}-`); store «DIRECTOR_ACCOUNTS»
4. For each in «DIRECTOR_ACCOUNTS»: emit fact via {buf_write_fact_multi} with extension RBCC_fact_ext_roster_director (expands to `roster-director`); basename = identity, content = full email per paddock convention
5. Optional final {rbbc_show} of count, no per-account stdout enumeration

CRITICAL: Roster contract is "presence-as-fact" with EMPTY fact content (per RBS0:1081). However the ₣BB paddock note explicitly says "content = full email (immutable, no re-derivation needed by consumers)". These appear to disagree — RBS0 spec is the source-of-truth-at-mount. Follow RBS0 here: fact content is empty, presence-as-fact. (If the paddock convention later overrides, that's a downstream pace concern.)

PRESERVE FROM ORPHAN:
- The link:https://...[iam.projects.serviceAccounts.list] reference
- HTTP 200 expectation
- The {rbbc_*} action-verb idiom
- The empty-result handling pattern

LINKED TERMS TO USE:
- {rbtr_governor}, {rbtr_director}
- {rbtgi_depot_project}
- {rbtoe_governor_authenticate}
- {giam_service_account}
- {buf_write_fact_multi}

GOLD-STANDARD SHAPE TO MATCH:
Read these files for shape/depth reference:
- /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSDE-depot_levy.adoc (gold standard)
- /Users/bhyslop/projects/rbm_alpha_recipemuster/Tools/rbk/vov_veiled/RBSDL-depot_list.adoc (similar list-and-emit-facts pattern, look for the depot fact emission)

ANCHOR PLACEMENT:
The first lines of the new file MUST be:
```
//axhob_operation
{rbtgo_director_roster}
```
(Do NOT add a separate `[[rbtgo_director_roster]]` line — see how RBSDE/RBSDV open.)

VERIFY YOUR OUTPUT:
- Opening: //axhob_operation + linked-term operation name
- All step blocks use //axhos_step opener
- All linked-terms use {curly_braces} not raw uppercase
- API endpoints have full link:URL[anchor-text] form
- File closes with //axhoc_completion + summary prose

CONSTRAINTS:
- Do NOT touch any other files. Do NOT make any commits. Just write to the target file.
- Do NOT include code blocks or shell snippets — this is pure spec prose.
- Length: ~50-70 lines (compact list+emit pattern).

After writing, report in 4 lines max:
1. Final line count
2. The first 3 lines of the file (to verify anchor opener)
3. Number of //axhos_step blocks
4. Confirmation that {rbrr_depot_project_id} does not appear in your output

content.text: I'll read the reference files first to understand the shape and grammar.

content.content:
1	//axhob_operation
2	{rbtgo_sa_list}
3	
4	NOTE: This operation lists all service accounts in the
5	{rbtgi_depot_project}.
6	It is a multi-role operation that can be invoked by any authenticated role with project read access.
7	
8	//axhos_step
9	. *Authenticate*:
10	.. {rbbc_require}
11	caller has valid OAuth token with `https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform` scope
12	.. {rbbc_store}
13	`«ACCESS_TOKEN»` from caller context
14	
15	//axhos_step
16	. *List Service Accounts*:
17	.. {rbbc_call}
18	link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/list[iam.projects.serviceAccounts.list] with:
19	... method: `GET`
20	... endpoint: `https://iam.googleapis.com/v1/projects/{rbrr_depot_project_id}/serviceAccounts`
21	... header: `Authorization: Bearer «ACCESS_TOKEN»`
22	.. {rbbc_require}
23	HTTP 200 response
24	.. {rbbc_store}
25	`«ACCOUNTS»` from response `.accounts[]` array
26	.. {rbbc_store}
27	`«ACCOUNT_COUNT»` from response `.accounts | length`
28	
29	//axhos_step
30	. *Handle Empty Result*:
31	.. If `«ACCOUNT_COUNT»` is 0:
32	... {rbbc_show}
33	"No service accounts found in project"
34	... Return success
35	
36	//axhoot_typed_output
37	{rbtgi_depot_project}
38	. *Display Results*:
39	.. {rbbc_show}
40	"Found «ACCOUNT_COUNT»` service account(s):"
41	.. For each account in `«ACCOUNTS»`:
42	... {rbbc_show}
43	account `.email` and `.displayName`
44	.. {rbbc_show}
45	listing completed successfully
46	
47	//axhoc_completion
48	Successful execution lists all service accounts in the depot project.
49

1	//axhob_operation
2	{rbtgo_depot_levy}
3	
4	NOTE: This operation creates an
5	{rbtgi_depot}
6	- a cohesive unit of Recipe Bottle infrastructure including the depot project, build bucket, container repository, Mason service account, and private worker pool
7	that share their productive lifecycle.
8	
9	The
10	{rbtr_payor}
11	creates a new depot infrastructure from the
12	{rbtgi_payor_project}.
13	The operation accepts no CLI parameters; depot identity is read from the kindled regime as `(RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX, RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER)`.
14	
15	//axhos_step
16	. *Authenticate as
17	{rbtr_payor}*:
18	.. Execute
19	{rbtoe_payor_authenticate}
20	
21	//axhos_step
22	. *Validate region against Artifact Registry locations*:
23	.. {rbbc_call}
24	link:https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations/list[locations.list] for the authenticated project
25	.. {rbbc_require}
26	`{rbrr_gcp_region}` present in the returned location set
27	
28	//axhos_step
29	. *Derive Depot Identity*:
30	.. {rbbc_store}
31	`«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»` as `${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}d-${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}` (resolved by `RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID`)
32	.. {rbbc_store}
33	`«GAR_REPOSITORY»` as `${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}-gar` (resolved by `RBDC_GAR_REPOSITORY`)
34	.. {rbbc_store}
35	`«WORKER_POOL_STEM»` as `${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}-pool` (resolved by `RBDC_GCB_POOL_STEM`)
36	.. {rbbc_store}
37	`«BUILD_BUCKET»` as `${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}b-${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}` (resolved by `RBDC_GCS_BUCKET`)
38	.. NOTE: Joint length `${RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX}` + `d-` + `${RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER}` ≤ 30 chars (GCP project ID limit) is enforced upstream by `zrbrr_enforce` at regime kindle time, so this step performs no length validation.
39	
40	//axhos_step
41	. *Create Depot Project*:
42	.. {rbbc_submit}
43	link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/create[projects.create] with:
44	... projectId: `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
45	... displayName: `RB Depot: «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`
46	... parent: `{rbrp_parent_type}s/{rbrp_parent_id}` (if parent_type != `none`)
47	.. {rbbc_await}
48	returned operation
49	.. {rbbc_require}
50	project creation successful
51	.. NOTE: Project name collision against the GCP soft-delete graveyard surfaces here as fatal — re-using a moniker after `{rbtgo_depot_unmake}` requires waiting out the 30-day retention window. The operator-visible "fails if exists" property is intentional under the (CLOUD_PREFIX, MONIKER) shape.
52	
53	//axhos_step
54	. *Link Billing Account*:
55	.. {rbbc_call}
56	link:https://cloud.google.com/billing/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects/updateBillingInfo[cloudbilling.projects.updateBillingInfo] for `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
57	.. Set billingAccountName: `billingAccounts/{rbrp_billing_account_id}`
58	.. {rbbc_require}
59	HTTP 200 response confirming billing linkage
60	
61	//axhos_step
62	. *Get Depot Project Number*:
63	.. {rbbc_call}
64	link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/get[projects.get] for `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
65	.. {rbbc_store}
66	`«PROJECT_NUMBER»` from `.name` field (CRM v3 returns `projects/{number}`)
67	.. {rbbc_require}
68	valid numeric project number after extracting from name
69	
70	//axhos_step
71	. *Enable Depot Project APIs*:
72	.. For each service in [`artifactregistry`, `cloudbuild`, `containeranalysis`, `iam`, `serviceusage`, `storage`]:
73	... Execute
74	{rbtoe_api_enable}
75	with service name and `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
76	.. {rbbc_require}
77	all APIs enabled successfully
78	
79	//axhos_step
80	. *Create Private Worker Pool*:
81	.. {rbbc_call}
82	link:https://cloud.google.com/build/docs/api/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.workerPools/create[workerPools.create] with:
83	... parent: `projects/«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»/locations/{rbrr_gcp_region}`
84	... workerPoolId: `«WORKER_POOL_STEM»`
85	... body:
86	+
87	----
88	{
89	  "privatePoolV1Config": {
90	    "workerConfig": {
91	      "machineType": "«RBRR_GCB_MACHINE_TYPE»"
92	    }
93	  }
94	}
95	----
96	.. NOTE:
97	{rbrr_gcb_machine_type}
98	is a Compute Engine machine type (e.g., `e2-standard-2`), consumed at pool creation time.
99	Pool scales to zero workers when idle — no idle cost accrues.
100	.. Treat HTTP 409 CONFLICT as success (pool already exists — idempotent)
101	
102	//axhos_step
103	. *Verify IAM Propagation*:
104	.. NOTE: After API enablement, IAM permissions may not be immediately available due to eventual consistency.
105	.. {rbbc_poll}
106	link:https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.repositories/list[artifactregistry.repositories.list] for `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»` in `{rbrr_gcp_region}`
107	.. Poll at `RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC` intervals until HTTP 200 or `RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC` timeout
108	.. {rbbc_require}
109	HTTP 200 response confirming IAM propagation complete
110	.. {rbbc_fatal}
111	if timeout: "IAM propagation timeout - artifactregistry API not accessible"
112	
113	//axhos_step
114	. *Create Build Bucket*:
115	.. {rbbc_call}
116	link:https://cloud.google.com/storage/docs/json_api/v1/buckets/insert[storage.buckets.insert] with:
117	... name: `«BUILD_BUCKET»`
118	... location: `{rbrr_gcp_region}`
119	... project: `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
120	... lifecycle rule: delete objects after 1 day
121	
122	//axhos_step
123	. *Create Container Repository*:
124	.. {rbbc_submit}
125	link:https://cloud.google.com/artifact-registry/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.locations.repositories/create[artifactregistry.repositories.create] with:
126	... repositoryId: `«GAR_REPOSITORY»`
127	... format: `DOCKER`
128	... location: `{rbrr_gcp_region}`
129	... parent: `projects/«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»/locations/{rbrr_gcp_region}`
130	.. {rbbc_await}
131	returned operation
132	
133	//axhos_step
134	. *Create
135	{rbtr_mason}
136	Service Account*:
137	.. NOTE: The
138	{rbtr_mason}
139	replaces Cloud Build's implicit service account to provide deterministic permissions and predictable authorization within the depot infrastructure.
140	.. {rbbc_call}
141	link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/docs/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/create[iam.serviceAccounts.create] with:
142	... accountId: `mason-«RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`
143	... displayName: `Mason for RB Depot: «RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER»`
144	... project: `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
145	.. {rbbc_store}
146	`«MASON_EMAIL»` from response `.email` field
147	
148	//axhos_step
149	. *Configure
150	{rbtr_mason}
151	Permissions*:
152	.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_repo} on `«GAR_REPOSITORY»`
153	... Add `serviceAccount:«MASON_EMAIL»` with `roles/artifactregistry.writer`
154	.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_bucket} on `«BUILD_BUCKET»`
155	... Add `serviceAccount:«MASON_EMAIL»` with `roles/storage.objectViewer`
156	.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_project} on `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»`
157	... Add `serviceAccount:«MASON_EMAIL»` with `roles/viewer`
158	... Add `serviceAccount:«MASON_EMAIL»` with `roles/logging.logWriter`
159	
160	//axhos_step
161	. *Enable Cloud Build service agent to impersonate
162	{rbtr_mason}*:
163	.. {rbtoe_iam_grant_sa} on `«MASON_EMAIL»`
164	.. Add member: `serviceAccount:service-«PROJECT_NUMBER»@gcp-sa-cloudbuild.iam.gserviceaccount.com`
165	.. Grant role: `roles/iam.serviceAccountTokenCreator`
166	.. NOTE: Cloud Build service agent is Google-provisioned (auto-created when Cloud Build API is enabled), not a user-created service account. The `tokenCreator` role enables build steps running as {rbtr_mason} (via the build JSON's `serviceAccount` field) to generate fresh access tokens for GCP API calls — required for GAR authentication (docker login, crane push). This is distinct from `serviceAccountUser` (actAs), which the {rbtr_director} holds on {rbtr_mason} for submitting builds.
167	.. {rbbc_require}
168	IAM binding successful
169	
170	//axhoot_typed_output
171	{rbtgi_depot}
172	. *Confirm Depot Creation*:
173	.. {rbbc_show}
174	single-line success banner naming `«DEPOT_PROJECT_ID»` and the
175	{rbtgo_governor_mantle}
176	follow-up hint
177	
178	//axhoot_typed_output
179	{rbtgi_depot}
180	. *Update Depot Tracking*:
181	.. Execute
182	{rbtoe_depot_list_update}
183	to refresh per-moniker depot fact files
184	
185	//axhoc_completion
186	Successful execution creates depot infrastructure with configured build bucket, container repository, Mason service account, and private worker pool — all derived from `(RBRR_CLOUD_PREFIX, RBRR_DEPOT_MONIKER)`.
187	Proceed to
188	{rbtgo_governor_mantle}
189	to create the
190	{rbtr_governor}
191	for this depot.
192

1	//axhob_operation
2	{rbtgo_depot_list}
3	
4	The
5	{rbtr_payor}
6	lists all
7	{rbtgi_depot}
8	instances billed to the
9	{rbtr_payor}
10	account and their status:
11	
12	//axhos_step
13	. *Authenticate as
14	{rbtr_payor}*:
15	.. Execute
16	{rbtoe_payor_authenticate}
17	
18	//axhos_step
19	. *Enumerate billing-account projects*:
20	.. {rbbc_call}
21	link:https://cloud.google.com/billing/reference/rest/v1/billingAccounts.projects/list[billingAccounts.projects.list]
22	for `billingAccounts/${RBRP_BILLING_ACCOUNT_ID}/projects`
23	.. {rbbc_store}
24	`«BILLED_PROJECTS»` — projects with `billingEnabled=true`
25	
26	//axhos_step
27	. *Classify each project as a depot*:
28	.. For each project in `«BILLED_PROJECTS»`:
29	... {rbbc_call}
30	link:https://cloud.google.com/iam/reference/rest/v1/projects.serviceAccounts/list[projects.serviceAccounts.list]
31	for the project's IAM service accounts
32	... Inspect service account emails for a match against
33	`mason-«MONIKER»@<project>.iam.gserviceaccount.com`
34	where `«MONIKER»` matches `^[a-z][a-z0-9]*$`
35	... Skip projects with no matching Mason service account
36	... {rbbc_store}
37	`«MONIKER»` by stripping the `mason-` prefix from the matched SA's local-part
38	
39	//axhos_step
40	. *Look up lifecycle state for each depot project*:
41	.. {rbbc_call}
42	link:https://cloud.google.com/resource-manager/reference/rest/v3/projects/get[projects.get]
43	for each Mason-SA-bearing project via CRM v1 `projects/${project_id}`
44	.. Classify state:
45	... `lifecycleState=ACTIVE` → `COMPLETE`
46	... `lifecycleState=DELETE_REQUESTED` → `DELETE_REQUESTED`
47	... Other lifecycle states → log and skip
48	
49	//axhos_step
50	. *Emit per-moniker fact files*:
51	.. {rbbc_store}
52	state string to `«MONIKER».depot`
53	(extension constant `RBGP_FACT_EXT_DEPOT`)
54	.. {rbbc_store}
55	canonical project_id to `«MONIKER».depot-project`
56	(extension constant `RBGP_FACT_EXT_DEPOT_PROJECT`)
57	
58	//axhoot_typed_output
59	{rbtgi_depot}
60	. *Display summary*:
61	.. {rbbc_show}
62	each depot moniker with state (`COMPLETE` or `DELETE_REQUESTED`)
63	.. {rbbc_show}
64	total depot count
65	
66	//axhoc_completion
67	Successful execution lists all depots billed to the
68	{rbtr_payor}
69	account.
70
